subcodes.first_line: O tested believer! Praise be to God that in the calamities encountered in His path thou art patient and dignified, even in the severest of trials [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن ممتحن الحمد لله در بلایاء فی سبیل الله صبور و وقوری و در اشد محن
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
